title: Ceviche casero con Zambos
ingredients: 500g of fresh white fish fillet, cubed
instructions: Place the fish in a bowl and cover with the lemon juice; let it rest until the fish is opaque and well marinated.
Add the red onion, tomato, cilantro, and salt to taste, mixing gently.
Add the Worcestershire sauce and ketchup.
Serve the ceviche cold, accompanied by Zambos Ceviche to use as a spoon when eating.
